requirement_topic.en: Marking — EN 149 Product Identification and Import Standardization Mark Visibility
requirement_topic.zh: 标识 — EN 149型号标识与进口标准化标志
requirement_topic.zht: 標識 — EN 149型號標識與進口標準化標誌

summary.en: Marking for Kenya-bound respirators must follow the adopted EN 149 vocabulary and Kenya requirements: standard year-reference, class, manufacturer identification, type designation, and durability of marking. In addition, the Import Standardization Mark (ISM) is the conformity visibility mark expected by KEBS market practice, and marking should remain consistent with the exact model named in the CoC. There is no CE-like one-size-fits-all mark for this route beyond the Kenya ISM in the import context.
summary.zh: 面向肯尼亚进口的呼吸器标识应按采用EN 149的要求和肯尼亚要求设置，包括标准代号与版本、等级、制造商标识、型号、以及耐久性。并且进口标准化标志（ISM）是KEBS市场实践中的合规可见标识，且标识内容应与CoC中指定的型号完全一致。该路径不存在适用于所有产品的CE类一体化标志，进口语境下以ISM与型号一致性为关键。
summary.zht: 面向肯亞進口的呼吸器標識應按採用EN 149的要求和肯亞要求設置，包括標準代號與版本、等級、製造商標識、型號，以及耐久性。並且進口標準化標誌（ISM）是KEBS市場實踐中的合規可見標識，且標識內容應與CoC中指定的型號完全一致。該路徑不存在適用於所有產品的CE式一體化標誌，進口語境下以ISM與型號一致性為關鍵。

standards_or_laws: Kenya Standard adopting EN 149 marking fields
KEBS Import Standardization Mark (ISM) for regulated import products

summary.en: GB 2626 marking uses KN class codes and manufacturer model language, with CCC mark where applicable in China. These markings do not by themselves provide Kenya market visibility because the ISM and adopted EN 149 class identity are what customs and PVoC traceability rely on.
summary.zh: GB 2626标识体系使用KN等级代码和中文/中文化型号表述，并在适用CCC场景下使用CCC标志。该标识体系本身不能提供肯尼亚市场可核验性，因为海关和PVoC追踪依赖的是ISM与EN 149等级身份。
summary.zht: GB 2626標識體系使用KN等級代碼和中文/中文化型號表述，並在適用CCC場景下使用CCC標誌。該標識體系本身不能提供肯尼亞市場可核驗性，因為海關和PVoC追蹤依賴的是ISM與EN 149等級身份。

standards_or_laws: GB 2626-2019 — marking and model designation framework
CCC mark (China Compulsory Certification) — domestic only

gap.en: Marking conversions are required for Kenya import: (1) KN terms should not be substituted for the EN 149 class claims supported by the KEBS CoC model; (2) ISM must be visible and aligned with the KEBS release package; (3) the EN 149 class and model must match the PVoC test file and CoC model exactly. A non-matching mark is a frequent clearance cause at Mombasa.
gap.zh: 需对标识进行转换：1）不能用KN分类替代KEBS CoC支持的EN149级别声明；2）ISM需清晰可见并与KEBS放行资料一致；3）EN149等级与型号需与PVoC检测文件和CoC型号完全一致。非匹配标识是蒙巴萨清关常见拒件原因。
gap.zht: 需對標識進行轉換：1）不能用KN分類取代KEBS CoC支持的EN149等級聲明；2）ISM需清晰可見並與KEBS放行資料一致；3）EN149等級與型號需與PVoC檢測文件和CoC型號完全一致。非匹配標識是蒙巴薩清關常見拒件原因。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ISM marking and EN 149-consistent model marking are required for import traceability and CoC alignment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 2626 marking and CCC mark required where applicable in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Kenya clearance, KN-class-only marking from China is insufficient. Respirators must be marked to the EN 149 basis used for the KEBS PVoC model and must display ISM-related traceability details expected by local enforcement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向肯尼亚清关时，仅CN KN级别标识不够。呼吸器必须按KEBS PVoC采纳的EN149技术基础进行标识，并配合ISM相关追溯信息。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向肯亞清關時僅CN KN級別標識不夠。呼吸器必須按KEBS PVoC採納的EN149技術基礎進行標識，並配合ISM相關追溯資訊。
